title: What your phone habit is actually about
caption:
The phone isn't your problem. It's what you're avoiding when you pick it up.

You open it at 11 PM without a plan and close it at 1 AM — not because you needed anything, but because silence started and something in you panicked. That's not a screen issue. That's a soul issue.

Psalm 46:10 — "Be still and know that I am God." The men who've walked with God the longest will tell you: silence isn't where you lose yourself. It's where you finally find Him.

The battle isn't against a screen. It's against the version of you that can't stand not being entertained, not being stimulated, not being seen.

Put it down tonight. Just sit. See what shows up.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #discipline #manofgod #phonefasting #realself #scripture #psalm46
